items.title_zh: Snap发布天价AR眼镜后股价大跌
items.title_en: After unveiling ridiculously expensive AR glasses, Snap’s stock takes a dive
items.summary_zh: Snap公司备受期待的增强现实（AR）智能眼镜终于亮相，但高昂的售价并未赢得市场欢心，反而导致其股价大幅下跌。这款AR眼镜定价远超同类产品，尽管技术先进，但消费者和投资者对其市场前景表示担忧。此次股价下跌反映出市场对Snap在AR领域高投入低回报的疑虑，也凸显了AR消费级产品商业化面临的挑战。
items.summary_en: Snap's long awaited smart glasses debut hasn't exactly done wonders for the company's stock.
items.why_zh: Snap的AR眼镜定价策略失败，导致股价大跌，凸显了AR消费市场对价格的敏感度。
items.why_en: Snap's expensive AR glasses lead to a stock drop, highlighting price sensitivity in the consumer AR market.

items.title_zh: OpenAI在ChatGPT中推出定时任务功能
items.title_en: OpenAI launches scheduled tasks in ChatGPT, details here
items.summary_zh: OpenAI宣布在ChatGPT中推出定时任务功能，允许用户设置在未来特定时间执行的任务。该功能旨在提升ChatGPT的实用性和自动化能力，用户可安排消息发送、数据检索等操作。此举进一步扩展了ChatGPT作为生产力工具的应用场景，但也引发了对隐私和任务可靠性的讨论。
items.summary_en: OpenAI launches scheduled tasks in ChatGPT, details here 9to5Mac
items.why_zh: 定时任务功能使ChatGPT从被动对话工具转向主动任务执行，标志着AI助手功能的重大升级。
items.why_en: Scheduled tasks transform ChatGPT from a reactive chatbot to a proactive assistant, marking a significant upgrade in AI capabilities.

items.title_zh: Workforce Solutions为高中生推出AI暑期项目
items.title_en: Workforce Solutions launches AI summer program for high school students
items.summary_zh: Workforce Solutions宣布启动面向高中生的AI暑期项目，旨在培养年轻一代的人工智能技能。该项目将提供课程、实践项目和行业导师指导，帮助学生掌握机器学习、数据科学等基础知识。此举反映了教育机构和企业对AI人才早期培养的重视，也为学生未来进入科技行业铺路。
items.summary_en: Workforce Solutions launches AI summer program for high school students KGNS
items.why_zh: 该项目针对高中生进行AI教育，有助于缓解未来AI人才短缺，并促进技术教育的普及。
items.why_en: Targeting high school students, this program addresses future AI talent shortages and promotes tech education.

items.title_zh: 豆包日活2亿仍亏损，日收入不足百万
items.title_en: Doubao: 200M DAU but Still Loss-Making, Daily Revenue Under 1M Yuan
items.summary_zh: 豆包日活2亿仍亏损，日收入不足百万 新浪网
items.summary_en: ByteDance's AI product Doubao has reached 200 million daily active users but remains unprofitable, with daily revenue below 1 million yuan. This highlights the gap between user scale and monetization in AI apps.
items.why_zh: 揭示了AI产品用户规模与商业化之间的巨大矛盾，对行业盈利模式具有警示意义。
items.why_en: Reveals the huge gap between user scale and monetization in AI products, serving as a warning for the industry's business models.

items.title_zh: Compunnel推出AI初创企业孵化器

items.summary_en: Compunnel Launches AI Startup Incubators New Jersey Business Magazine
items.why_zh: 体现了企业界对AI初创生态的积极布局，有助于推动AI技术创新和商业化。
items.why_en: Reflects corporate commitment to fostering AI innovation and commercialization through startup support.

items.title_zh: 皮尤研究：仅16%美国人认为AI对社会有积极影响
items.title_en: Only 16 percent of Americans think AI will have a positive impact on society, a new study shows
items.summary_zh: 皮尤研究中心最新报告显示，尽管华尔街对AI行业热情高涨，但美国普通民众对AI的乐观程度显著较低。仅16%的受访者认为AI将对社会产生积极影响，而63%的人认为AI技术发展过快。报告还指出，AI聊天机器人的使用率自2024年以来大幅上升，从33%增至49%，其中ChatGPT的使用率自2023年翻倍，达到44%。然而，使用率的增长并未转化为正面看法，年轻一代虽然使用AI更多，但态度也更为谨慎。
items.summary_en: Although Wall Street loves AI, every day Americans are significantly less optimistic about the industry, a new report from Pew Research shows.
items.why_zh: 该调查揭示了AI行业快速发展与公众担忧之间的显著鸿沟，对政策制定和企业战略有重要参考价值。
items.why_en: This survey highlights the significant gap between AI industry enthusiasm and public skepticism, informing policy and corporate strategy.

items.title_zh: DeepSeek首轮融资510亿元估值4000亿，腾讯宁德时代京东网易参投
items.title_en: DeepSeek Raises 51 Billion Yuan in First External Round, Valuation at 400 Billion
items.summary_zh: DeepSeek首轮融资510亿元估值4000亿，腾讯宁德时代京东网易参投 新浪财经
items.summary_en: DeepSeek completed its first external funding round on June 16, 2026, raising approximately 51 billion yuan at a valuation of nearly 400 billion yuan. Investors include founder Liang Wenfeng, Tencent, CATL, JD.com, and NetEase. The company, known for its open-source large language models, had previously been fully funded by High-Flyer Quant.
items.why_zh: 这是DeepSeek首次引入外部资本，标志着中国AI大模型领域获得顶级产业资本和互联网巨头的高度认可。
items.why_en: This marks DeepSeek's first external funding, signaling strong endorsement from top industrial and internet giants in China's AI large model sector.

items.title_zh: DeepSeek 以 4000 亿元估值完成首轮外部融资：510 亿元到账，投资方含梁文锋、腾讯、宁德时代、京东、网易等
items.title_en: DeepSeek Closes First External Round at 400 Billion Valuation, Investors Include Tencent, CATL
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 17 日消息，企查查数据显示，杭州深度求索人工智能基础技术研究有限公司已于 2026 年 6 月 16 日完成首轮外部融资，整体融资规模约 510 亿元，企业估值近 4000 亿元。 本轮融资的投资方阵容涵盖了产业资本、互联网巨头与国家队，具体投资方包括创始人梁文锋、腾讯、宁德时代、网易、京东、Monolith 砺思资本、IDG 资本、正心谷投资、拾象科技以及国家人工智能产业投资基金合伙企业（有限合伙）。 DeepSeek 成立于 2023 年 7 月 17 日，总部位于浙江省杭州市拱墅区，主要从事大语言模型及多模态 AI 技术研发，其推出的 DeepSeek 系列开源模型是国内领先的开源大模型之一。公司此前一直由其母公司 —— 梁文锋于 2015 年创立的幻方量化全资支持，幻方量化巅峰时期资产管理规模突破 700 亿元。正是凭借量化业务积累的利润，DeepSeek 才得以维持多年独立运营。 此外，宁德时代近期在 AI 数据中心领域动作频频 ——2026 年 4 月以约 41 亿元入股智算中心 HVDC 市场龙头中恒电气，5 月又以约 9.42 亿美元入股 IDC 公司世纪互联。 据此前路透社报道，梁文锋要求外部投资者将资金投入由其管理的有限合伙企业，而非直接持股 DeepSeek，并对所有投资者设置五年锁定期。据接近梁文锋的人士解释，此举旨在筛选投资者，排除追求…
items.summary_en: DeepSeek completed its first external funding round on June 16, 2026, raising 51 billion yuan at a 400 billion yuan valuation. Investors include Liang Wenfeng, Tencent, CATL, NetEase, JD.com, and national AI fund. Founder Liang Wenfeng structured the deal to require investors to put money into a limited partnership with a five-year lock-up, aiming to select long-term partners.
items.why_zh: DeepSeek首次引入外部资本，且投资方阵容强大，包括产业资本、互联网巨头和国家队，显示其在中国AI领域的领先地位和战略价值。
items.why_en: DeepSeek's first external funding with a strong investor lineup including industrial, internet, and state-backed funds underscores its leading position and strategic value in China's AI landscape.

items.summary_en: Doubao AI has surpassed 200 million daily active users, but its revenue sources remain unclear. The AI assistant app likely monetizes through subscriptions, ads, or enterprise services, but high daily costs (tens of millions) raise questions about its business model sustainability.
items.why_zh: 豆包AI的高用户规模与商业困局并存，反映了当前AI应用在用户增长与盈利之间的普遍挑战。
items.why_en: Doubao AI's large user base alongside unclear revenue highlights the common challenge of monetization in AI applications.

items.title_zh: 日耗数千万，用户超2亿的豆包AI如何撑起商业困局？
items.title_en: How Can Doubao AI, with 200M+ Users and Millions in Daily Costs, Solve Its Business Dilemma?
items.summary_zh: 日耗数千万，用户超2亿的豆包AI如何撑起商业困局？ 新浪网
items.summary_en: Doubao AI has over 200 million daily active users but faces daily costs in the tens of millions. Its revenue streams may include subscriptions, ads, and enterprise services, but a stable profit model is lacking. The market is watching how it balances growth and monetization, and whether ByteDance will continue support.
items.why_zh: 豆包AI的案例凸显了AI产品在用户规模庞大时仍面临的盈利挑战，对行业商业模式探索具有参考意义。
items.why_en: Doubao AI's situation exemplifies the profitability challenges faced by AI products even with massive user bases, offering insights for industry business model exploration.

items.title_zh: 谷歌六年来首款智能音箱将于下周发货
items.title_en: Google’s first smart speaker in six years arrives next week
items.summary_zh: 谷歌宣布其六年来首款新智能音箱 Google Home Speaker 将于 6 月 25 日开始发货，略晚于此前承诺的春季发布窗口。该音箱售价 99 美元，今日（6 月 17 日）开启预购。硬件方面与九个月前发布时一致，采用略微压扁的圆形设计，顶部有触控电容按钮，底部有状态指示灯环。提供四种颜色选择：瓷白、炭黑、珊瑚红和雾蓝。
items.summary_en: The Google Home Speaker comes in four colors, including porcelain. (Stroopwafel not included.) | Photo by Jennifer Pattison Tuohy / The Verge Google's first new smart speaker in six years starts shipping on June 25th, narrowly missing its promised spring launch window . Preorders for the Google Home Speaker open today, June 17th. Nothing has changed hardware-wise in the nine months since the $99 speaker was announced . It has the same slightly squished round design, with touch-capacitive buttons on top and a light ring at the bottom to indicate status. And it still comes in four colors: porcel…
items.why_zh: 这是谷歌六年来首次更新智能音箱产品线，标志着其在智能家居领域的战略回归。
items.why_en: This is Google's first smart speaker update in six years, signaling its strategic return to the smart home market.

items.title_zh: 阿里发布世界模型 HappyOyster 快乐生蚝 1.0：一句话生成可实时交互的数字世界
items.title_en: Alibaba Releases World Model HappyOyster 1.0: Generate Real-Time Interactive Digital Worlds with a Single Sentence
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 17 日消息，阿里云今晚宣布推出可实时构建和交互的开放式世界模型产品 HappyOyster 1.0（快乐生蚝 1.0）。一句话，即可生成一个完整、可演绎、可探索、可互动的数字世界。 据介绍，该产品深度学习物理世界状态转移规律，能主动推演从动作到反馈的因果链，并保持人物和环境的长程一致性。 Happy Oyster 基于原生多模态架构，支持多模态输入与音视频联合生成。区别于传统 " 写 prompt → 等渲染 → 收到成片 " 的一次性流程，Happy Oyster 在生成过程中持续接收用户指令，画面实时响应、持续演绎。 IT之家注意到，HappyOyster 1.0 已于今年 4 月 16 日开放内测，目前官网开放了两种玩法： 实时导演 (Directing) ： 一句话，故事即刻上演，随时叫停，随时改写。 和虚拟男友实时互动：输入“去海边”“哄哄我”，TA 会即时响应你的每一句话。 短剧内容意难平? 暂停画面 — 输入期望走向，回溯上一章节重新演绎剧情。 更多互动游戏体验：云养萌宠、变身换装 ... 每句指令都能触发隐藏玩法 ~ 世界探索 (Adventure) ： 进入画面探索，多种交互 —— 能跳、能打、还能飞！ 世界奇观漫游：抵达极光冰原、潜入深海、步入油画更或者是怪诞梦境。 多种运动体验：滑板冲刺、翼装滑翔、骑马奔驰，用键盘感受操控的自由。 开放世界…
items.summary_en: Alibaba Cloud launches HappyOyster 1.0, an open world model that generates real-time interactive digital worlds from a single sentence. It supports multimodal input and real-time response, offering features like virtual boyfriend interaction and world exploration. Internal testing began on April 16.
items.why_zh: HappyOyster 1.0 代表了 AI 生成内容从静态到实时交互的跨越，可能重塑数字内容创作和交互方式。
items.why_en: HappyOyster 1.0 represents a leap from static to real-time interactive AI-generated content, potentially reshaping digital content creation and interaction.

items.title_zh: AI进化速递丨智谱GLM-5.2上线并开源
items.title_en: Zhipu AI Launches and Open-Sources GLM-5.2
items.summary_zh: AI进化速递丨智谱GLM-5.2上线并开源 Sohu
items.summary_en: Zhipu AI has launched and open-sourced its new model GLM-5.2, achieving leading performance on NLP tasks and supporting domestic computing platforms.
items.why_zh: 开源新一代旗舰模型，有助于推动AI技术民主化和国产算力生态发展。
items.why_en: Open-sourcing a new flagship model promotes AI democratization and domestic computing ecosystem growth.

items.title_zh: 有传言称，DeepSeek或已完成超过500亿元融资
items.title_en: Rumor: DeepSeek May Have Completed Over 50 Billion Yuan in Funding
items.summary_zh: 有传言称，DeepSeek或已完成超过500亿元融资 新浪网
items.summary_en: Rumors suggest that AI company DeepSeek may have completed over 50 billion yuan in funding. If true, it would be one of the largest funding rounds in China's AI sector, providing significant resources for R&D and expansion.
items.why_zh: 若融资属实，DeepSeek 将获得巨额资金，可能加速其大模型研发并改变国内 AI 竞争格局。
items.why_en: If true, the funding would give DeepSeek massive resources to accelerate its LLM development and potentially reshape China's AI landscape.

items.title_zh: DeepSeek完成首轮融资后，也要开始追求ARR吗？
items.title_en: After First Funding Round, Will DeepSeek Also Start Pursuing ARR?
items.summary_zh: DeepSeek完成首轮融资后，也要开始追求ARR吗？ 新浪财经
items.summary_en: After its first funding round, attention turns to whether DeepSeek will start pursuing Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR). As an AI model provider, it may shift to subscription or enterprise services for stable income, impacting its commercialization strategy.
items.why_zh: DeepSeek 是否追求 ARR 将揭示其商业化方向，对 AI 模型提供商的商业模式有示范意义。
items.why_en: Whether DeepSeek pursues ARR will reveal its commercialization direction, setting an example for AI model providers' business models.

items.title_zh: Qt Creator 20 开源跨平台 IDE 发布，支持接入 AI 智能体
items.title_en: Qt Creator 20 Open-Source Cross-Platform IDE Released with AI Agent Support
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 17 日消息，据科技媒体 Phoronix 今天报道，Qt Creator 20 开源跨平台 IDE 现已发布，加入 AI 智能体支持。 据介绍，Qt Creator 20 引入全新 ACP（IT之家注：Agent Client Protocol）框架， 可兼容 Claude Code、OpenAI Codex 等主流大语言模型和 AI 助手 ，以及其他支持 ACP 协议的 AI 服务。开发者可直接在应用内的聊天面板，与 AI 智能体进行交互。 同时，Qt Creator 19 此前已引入 MCP 协议，本次更新则是进一步扩展 AI 生态，让开发者能够接入更多 AI 服务。 此外，本次更新还新增了“禅模式”（Zen Mode），开启后将编辑器界面变得更加沉浸，减少不必要的视觉元素，让开发者专注于代码。
items.summary_en: Qt Creator 20 is released with AI agent support via the new ACP framework, compatible with Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, and other LLMs. Developers can interact with AI agents in a chat panel. It also adds a Zen Mode for immersive editing.
items.why_zh: Qt Creator 20 的 AI 集成使开发者能直接在 IDE 中利用大模型辅助编程，提升开发效率。
items.why_en: Qt Creator 20's AI integration allows developers to leverage LLMs directly in the IDE, boosting productivity.

items.title_zh: 氪星晚报｜菜鸟将在荷兰建设欧洲供应链履约中心；有道词典笔获2026 EdTech Breakthrough Award年度K-12教育科技应用大奖；国务院：深入实施“人工智能+”行动，探索人机协同的新型工作形态
items.title_en: Evening News: Cainiao to Build European Supply Chain Fulfillment Center in Netherlands; Youdao Dictionary Pen Wins EdTech Award; State Council: Deepen 'AI+' Action
items.summary_zh: 大公司： 监管约谈山姆后，沃尔玛中国多位高管变动 36氪了解到，山姆会员商店中国 CMO（首席采购官）张青已于近日提交辞呈。此外，据36氪独家了解，沃尔玛中国本次人事变动还包括：Tony Paladinetti，现任沃尔玛国际部战略副总裁，将加入沃尔玛中国，担任沃尔玛中国战略副总裁，直接向朱晓静汇报。内部邮件称，Tony将在完成工作签证流程后于2026年8月正式加入中国团队，并与妻子Meg及孩子一起搬迁至深圳。现任沃尔玛中国战略副总裁杨智安将直接向Tony汇报。过渡期间，Neil Maffey，前任山姆会员商店首席采购官及现任全职顾问，将担任代理山姆会员商店首席采购官，直接向刘鹏，山姆会员商店业态总裁汇报，直至新负责人到岗。祝骏，沃尔玛商店业态总裁将扩大其职责，分管沃尔玛中国地产部。现任沃尔玛中国地产部高级副总裁张晋元将直接向祝骏汇报。本周一，市场监管总局发文称，针对一段时期以来监管发现和媒体曝光的山姆线下门店及线上网店多发的食品安全问题，近日对沃尔玛（中国）投资有限公司（即山姆总部）负责人进行了约谈。 阿里云新增巴黎、柔佛地域，扩建日本、墨西哥数据中心 36氪获悉，6月17日，阿里云在 VIVATECH大会期间宣布法国巴黎、马来西亚柔佛地域正式开服，同时扩建日本东京和墨西哥的数据中心，以满足AI出海与全球市场激增的Token调用需求。本轮扩张完成后，阿里云全球布局升至32个地域、…
items.summary_en: This evening news covers: Cainiao to build a European supply chain fulfillment center in the Netherlands; Youdao Dictionary Pen wins EdTech Breakthrough Award; State Council calls for deepening 'AI+' action and exploring human-machine collaboration. Also includes Sam's Club CMO departure and Alibaba Cloud expansion.
items.why_zh: 国务院“人工智能+”行动为 AI 在各行业落地提供政策指引，菜鸟和阿里云的扩张显示中国科技企业加速全球化。
items.why_en: The State Council's 'AI+' action provides policy guidance for AI deployment, while Cainiao and Alibaba Cloud expansions show Chinese tech firms accelerating globalization.

items.title_zh: 微软正考虑接入深度求索模型赋能Copilot协同办公工具
items.title_en: Microsoft Considers DeepSeek V4 Model to Cut Copilot Costs
items.summary_zh: 据阿克西奥斯新闻网报道，微软正考虑引入中国人工智能企业深度求索推出的 V4 大模型，作为旗下Copilot协同办公智能助手的低成本备选技术方案。报道称，这家美国科技巨头正在测试由微软云本地部署运行的深度求索V4版本以及其他开源大模型，用来替代目前为Copilot协同办公提供技术支持的Anthropic、OpenAI大模型，以此压缩服务成本。微软计划在未来几周内面向市场推出这款低成本大模型服务。（新浪财经）
items.summary_en: Microsoft is reportedly testing DeepSeek's V4 model and other open-source models as a low-cost alternative for its Copilot assistant, aiming to reduce reliance on Anthropic and OpenAI. The company plans to launch the service within weeks.
items.why_zh: 微软若采用DeepSeek模型，将显著降低AI办公助手的运营成本，并可能推动行业向开源和低成本模型转型。
items.why_en: Adopting DeepSeek could drastically cut costs for AI assistants and accelerate the shift toward open-source models.

items.title_zh: 豆包日耗超B站！2亿用户难盈利，AI免费时代要终结？
items.title_en: Doubao's Daily Users Surpass Bilibili, but Profitability Remains Elusive
items.summary_zh: 豆包日耗超B站！2亿用户难盈利，AI免费时代要终结？ 新浪网
items.summary_en: Doubao, ByteDance's AI assistant, has surpassed Bilibili in daily active users with 200 million users, but struggles to turn a profit due to high computing costs. This raises questions about the sustainability of free AI services.
items.why_zh: 豆包的困境凸显了AI产品用户增长与盈利之间的鸿沟，可能促使行业重新思考免费模式的可行性。
items.why_en: Doubao's case highlights the gap between user growth and profitability in AI, potentially prompting a shift away from free models.

items.title_zh: 豪掷50亿押注DeepSeek，宁王跨界AI背后藏何“阳谋”？
items.title_en: CATL Invests 5 Billion in DeepSeek, Expanding into AI
items.summary_zh: 豪掷50亿押注DeepSeek，宁王跨界AI背后藏何“阳谋”？ Sina finance
items.summary_en: CATL, the world's top battery maker, invests 5 billion yuan in AI startup DeepSeek, signaling a strategic move to integrate AI into battery R&D and manufacturing.
items.why_zh: 宁德时代的大额投资表明传统制造业巨头正积极拥抱AI，以提升效率和创新能力。
items.why_en: CATL's investment shows traditional manufacturers are aggressively adopting AI to boost efficiency and innovation.

items.title_zh: 豪掷50亿押注DeepSeek，宁王跨界AI背后藏何“阳谋”？
items.title_en: CATL invests 5 billion in DeepSeek, signaling cross-industry AI ambitions
items.summary_zh: 豪掷50亿押注DeepSeek，宁王跨界AI背后藏何“阳谋”？ Sina finance
items.summary_en: Battery giant CATL has invested 5 billion yuan in AI company DeepSeek, signaling its cross-industry AI ambitions. The move may aim to leverage AI for battery R&D and production optimization.
items.why_zh: 宁德时代的跨界投资表明AI技术正渗透传统制造业，可能推动产业智能化升级。
items.why_en: CATL's cross-industry investment shows AI technology penetrating traditional manufacturing, potentially driving industrial intelligence upgrades.

items.title_zh: 智谱科创板IPO进度条更新了
items.title_en: Zhipu's STAR Market IPO progress updated
items.summary_zh: 智谱科创板IPO进度条更新了 Sina finance
items.summary_en: Zhipu's STAR Market IPO progress has been updated, though details are undisclosed. The AI company's listing process is closely watched as a bellwether for domestic AI firms.
items.why_zh: 智谱IPO进度更新反映中国AI企业上市进程加速，对行业估值和融资环境有指标意义。
items.why_en: The update on Zhipu's IPO progress reflects accelerating listings of Chinese AI companies, serving as a benchmark for industry valuation and funding environment.

items.title_zh: 有传言称，DeepSeek或已完成超过500亿元融资
items.title_en: Rumor: DeepSeek Has Completed Over 50 Billion Yuan in Funding
items.summary_zh: 有传言称，DeepSeek或已完成超过500亿元融资 新浪财经
items.summary_en: Market rumors suggest DeepSeek has raised over 50 billion yuan, aligning with recent reports of a 51 billion yuan round. The funding would boost DeepSeek's valuation significantly.
items.why_zh: 若属实，将进一步巩固DeepSeek作为中国AI融资额最高公司之一的地位。
items.why_en: If true, it would solidify DeepSeek's position as one of the highest-funded AI companies in China.

items.title_zh: Pinterest推出实验性AI购物应用“Ask Pinterest”
items.title_en: Pinterest launches an experimental AI shopping app called ‘Ask Pinterest’
items.summary_zh: Pinterest推出了一款名为“Ask Pinterest”的实验性AI购物应用，用户可以通过对话式界面获取商品推荐和灵感。该应用利用AI技术理解用户自然语言查询，并提供个性化的购物建议。这是Pinterest在AI购物领域的最新尝试，旨在提升用户体验并增加平台粘性。目前该应用处于实验阶段，仅对部分用户开放。
items.summary_en: Pinterest has launched 'Ask Pinterest,' an experimental AI-powered shopping app that lets users seek recommendations and inspiration through a conversational interface.
items.why_zh: 该应用展示了AI在电商领域的创新应用，可能改变用户在线购物的方式。
items.why_en: This app showcases AI's potential in e-commerce, potentially transforming how users shop online.

items.title_zh: 国家规范外卖平台补贴行为，淘宝闪购、京东外卖回应称坚决拥护
items.title_en: China Regulates Subsidies on Food Delivery Platforms; Taobao Flash Sale and JD Delivery Express Support
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 17 日消息，国家市场监管总局今日发布《 外卖平台补贴行为规范十条（征求意见稿） 》，面向社会公开征求意见。 美团随后发文，表示坚决拥护，将认真学习，积极配合，按照要求，推动各项规范要求落地见效。 后续，淘宝闪购和京东方面也相继发文表态，淘宝闪购称其将坚决支持市场监管总局制定相关规范，促进行业高质量发展。 对于《外卖平台补贴行为规范十条（征求意见稿）》，我们将与行业各方一道，共同维护公平有序的市场竞争环境。 京东外卖表示： 京东外卖始终坚持品质外卖定位，追求可持续发展的商业模式，我们将不断规范补贴行为，持续推进行业反内卷，拒绝恶性低价竞争。同时通过七鲜小厨、宝藏小馆等供应链模式创新，和“AI+ 后厨直播”、堂食判官系统等技术创新，推动品质外卖的高质量发展，让消费者更放心、让优质商家经营更好、让骑手更有保障和尊严，促进外卖平台服务行业创新和健康发展。 相关阅读： 《 美团：坚决拥护国家规范外卖平台补贴行为 》 《 不得以长期、大额补贴扰乱市场秩序，外卖平台新规公开征求意见 》 《 京沪首次联合对美团、淘宝闪购、京东外卖三大外卖平台企业开展行政指导 》
items.summary_en: China's market regulator proposes rules to curb excessive subsidies on food delivery platforms. Major players like Meituan, Taobao Flash Sale, and JD Delivery express support, with JD highlighting AI innovations for quality service.
items.why_zh: 规范补贴行为有助于防止恶性竞争，推动外卖行业向品质和服务创新转型。
items.why_en: Regulating subsidies prevents cutthroat competition and encourages innovation in service quality.

items.title_zh: 智谱科创板IPO，新进展
items.title_en: Zhipu AI's IPO on STAR Market Advances
items.summary_zh: 智谱科创板IPO，新进展 Sina finance
items.summary_en: Zhipu AI, a leading Chinese AI model developer, makes progress in its IPO on the STAR Market, signaling continued investor interest in AI companies.
items.why_zh: 智谱的IPO进展反映了AI行业在资本市场的热度，可能为其他AI公司上市提供参考。
items.why_en: Zhipu's IPO progress reflects strong capital market interest in AI, potentially paving the way for other AI firms.

items.title_zh: 梁文锋出资约200亿冲上热搜，DeepSeek首轮融资不止关乎钱
items.title_en: Liang Wenfeng Invests ~20 Billion in DeepSeek's First Funding Round
items.summary_zh: 梁文锋出资约200亿冲上热搜，DeepSeek首轮融资不止关乎钱 新浪财经
items.summary_en: DeepSeek founder Liang Wenfeng invests approximately 20 billion yuan in the company's first funding round, demonstrating strong confidence in its AI technology and accelerating its development.
items.why_zh: 创始人巨额自投资金表明对AI大模型赛道的坚定看好，可能吸引更多资本涌入。
items.why_en: The founder's massive personal investment signals strong conviction in AI large models, potentially attracting more capital to the sector.

items.title_zh: Broadridge利用Anthropic未发布AI强化关键软件
items.title_en: Broadridge taps Anthropic's unreleased AI to harden critical software
items.summary_zh: 据Stock Titan报道，金融科技公司Broadridge正在利用Anthropic尚未公开发布的AI模型来强化其关键软件系统。Broadridge为全球金融机构提供处理交易、投资者沟通等关键任务的技术平台。通过引入先进的AI技术，Broadridge旨在提升软件的安全性和可靠性，防范潜在风险。此举也凸显了金融行业对AI安全应用的重视。
items.summary_en: Broadridge taps Anthropic's unreleased AI to harden critical software Stock Titan
items.why_zh: 该合作展示了AI在金融安全领域的应用潜力，可能推动更多金融机构采用前沿AI技术。
items.why_en: This partnership highlights AI's potential in financial security, potentially driving broader adoption of cutting-edge AI in finance.

items.title_zh: 智谱科创板IPO辅导验收，新开源旗舰模型适配国产芯片
items.title_en: Zhipu AI Passes IPO Guidance Check, New Open-Source Flagship Model Adapted for Domestic Chips
items.summary_zh: 智谱科创板IPO辅导验收，新开源旗舰模型适配国产芯片 搜狐网
items.summary_en: Zhipu AI has passed the IPO guidance check for the STAR Market, marking a key step toward listing. It also open-sourced a new flagship model optimized for domestic chips like Huawei and Moore Threads, aiming to boost China's AI ecosystem.
items.why_zh: 智谱的IPO进展和国产芯片适配，体现了中国AI企业加速资本化与自主可控技术布局的趋势。
items.why_en: Zhipu's IPO progress and domestic chip adaptation highlight the trend of Chinese AI firms accelerating capitalization and self-reliance.

items.title_zh: 智谱开源新一代大模型GLM-5.2 跻身全球模型前三
items.title_en: Zhipu AI Open-Sources New GLM-5.2 Model, Ranking Among Top 3 Globally
items.summary_zh: 智谱开源新一代大模型GLM-5.2 跻身全球模型前三 中国日报网

items.title_zh: SkillChain-Gym：面向中断下技能重塑的生产库存控制基准
items.title_en: SkillChain-Gym: A Benchmark for Reskilling-Aware Production-Inventory Control under Disruptions
items.summary_zh: arXiv 发布了一项名为 SkillChain-Gym 的新基准，用于评估在中断情况下考虑技能重塑的生产库存控制策略。现有运营基准通常将劳动力视为外生变量，而包含技能和学习的劳动力规划模型很少作为可复用的测试平台发布。SkillChain-Gym 将劳动力能力作为决策变量，考虑认证失效、新产品所需技能以及技能重塑与生产争夺工时等现实因素。该基准为研究人员提供了一个标准化的测试环境，以开发更智能的生产规划算法。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.17266v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Production planning increasingly has to treat workforce capability as a decision variable: certifications lapse when skills are not maintained, new products require skills the current workforce does not hold, and reskilling competes for the same worker hours needed for production. Existing operations benchmarks usually treat labor as exogenous, while workforce-planning models with skills and learning are rarely released as reusable testbeds. We introduce SkillChain-Gym, a benchmark specification for reskilling-aware production-inventory control:…
items.why_zh: 该基准填补了将劳动力技能动态纳入生产规划的标准化测试平台的空白，对提升供应链韧性具有重要意义。
items.why_en: This benchmark fills a gap in standardized testbeds that incorporate workforce skill dynamics into production planning, crucial for enhancing supply chain resilience.

items.title_zh: MLLP-VRAIN UPV 系统参与 IWSLT 2026 同声传译任务
items.title_en: MLLP-VRAIN UPV system for the IWSLT 2026 Simultaneous Speech Translation task
items.summary_zh: MLLP-VRAIN 研究团队描述了其参与 IWSLT 2026 同声传译共享任务的情况。他们的系统利用近期发布的 Parakeet 和 Qwen 3.5 模型，通过自适应“黑盒”策略构建了一个稳健的级联解决方案，用于长语音的同声翻译。团队探索了策略的松弛方法，以在质量和延迟之间取得更好的平衡。与去年相比，今年他们参与了所有语言方向，包括英语到德语、意大利语和中文等。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.17255v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: This work describes the participation of the MLLP-VRAIN research group in the shared task of the IWSLT 2026 Simultaneous Speech Translation track. Our submission utilizes the recently released Parakeet and Qwen 3.5 models to create a robust, cascaded solution for long-form SimulST through the use of adaptive "black-box" policies. We explore relaxations of these policies to achieve better quality-latency trade-offs. Compared to last year, we participate on all language directions. In addition to this, for the En$\rightarrow${De, It, Zh} directio…
items.why_zh: 该工作展示了如何利用最新模型和自适应策略提升同声传译系统的性能，对实时翻译技术的发展具有参考价值。
items.why_en: This work demonstrates how to leverage latest models and adaptive policies to improve simultaneous speech translation, offering insights for real-time translation technology.

items.title_zh: ReproRepo：利用 GitHub Issue 规模化开展可复现性审计
items.title_en: ReproRepo: Scaling Reproducibility Audits with GitHub Repository Issues
items.summary_zh: arXiv 提出了 ReproRepo，一个可扩展的可复现性评估框架，利用 GitHub 上的 Issue 作为自然发生的监督信号，来评估 LLM 代理协助复现研究结果的能力。现有基准依赖大量人工进行数据整理和评估，难以规模化。ReproRepo 在 1149 个近期机器学习仓库上进行了实例化，通过分析 Issue 中描述的实际复现障碍，自动评估 LLM 代理的表现。该方法有望大幅降低可复现性审计的成本，加速科学验证。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.18237v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Reproducing research results from papers and released code is central to scientific progress. Existing works have introduced benchmarks to evaluate whether LLM agents can assist with reproducibility, but they are difficult to scale due to their reliance on substantial manual effort for data curation and evaluation. We introduce ReproRepo, a scalable framework for reproducibility evaluation that leverages human-raised GitHub issues as naturally occurring supervision on realistic reproduction blockers. We instantiate ReproRepo on 1,149 recent mac…
items.why_zh: 该框架通过自动化利用 GitHub Issue 数据，显著降低了可复现性评估的人力成本，有助于推动科学研究的可复现性。
items.why_en: This framework automates reproducibility evaluation using GitHub issues, significantly reducing manual effort and promoting scientific reproducibility.

items.title_zh: 前沿 LLM 是否已为网络安全做好准备？来自双模式漏洞基准的证据
items.title_en: Are Frontier LLMs Ready for Cybersecurity? Evidence for Vertical Foundation Models from Dual-Mode Vulnerability Benchmarks
items.summary_zh: 一项研究通过双模式基准评估了前沿 LLM 在网络安全领域的准备情况：白盒函数级漏洞检测（VulnLLM-R，涵盖 C/Java/Python）和黑盒 Web 应用安全测试（5 个生产级应用，包含 118 个真实漏洞，涉及 20 多个 CWE 类别）。测试了 GPT-5.4、Codex 5.3、Claude Opus 4.7、Sonnet 4.6、Gemini 3.1 Pro 和 Gemini 3 Flash 等六个前沿模型以及两个领域专用模型。研究结果揭示了这些模型在漏洞检测和安全测试中的表现，为垂直领域基础模型的应用提供了参考。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.23243v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: We evaluate whether frontier LLMs are ready for cybersecurity through a dual-mode benchmark: white-box function-level vulnerability detection (VulnLLM-R, across C/Java/Python) and black-box web application security testing (five production-style applications with 118 ground-truth vulnerabilities across 20+ CWE families, which we will open-source). We test six frontier models (GPT-5.4, Codex~5.3, Claude Opus~4.7, Sonnet~4.6, Gemini~3.1~Pro and Gemini~3~Flash) and two domain-specialized models across four testing paradigms. Our findings a…
items.why_zh: 该研究系统评估了前沿 LLM 在网络安全关键任务上的能力，为垂直领域基础模型的开发和应用提供了重要依据。
items.why_en: This study systematically evaluates frontier LLMs on critical cybersecurity tasks, providing important evidence for developing and applying vertical foundation models.

items.title_zh: 「逆矩阵」完成超亿美元融资，创始人：通用世界基座模型窗口期已压至18个月
items.title_en: Physis Raises Over $100 Million; Founder Says Window for General World Foundation Model Narrowed to 18 Months
items.summary_zh: 文｜王毓婵 编辑｜张雨忻 2026 年以来，一级市场对世界模型的抢筹进入白热化阶段。资金不再像早期那样“广撒网”，而是高度向头部玩家集中。这其中，逆矩阵科技（Physis）就接连完成了多轮融资。 36氪智能涌现独家据悉，世界模型公司逆矩阵科技已完成超亿美元种子++轮融资；此前的 3 月，刚完成了超千万美元首轮融资。本轮由经纬创投、五源资本、光合创投等机构共同参与，并获蚂蚁集团战略投资，老股东高瓴创投、燕缘创投持续加注。 在本轮融资落定前后，逆矩阵发布了通用世界基座模型Physis-v0.1，并将其概括为“One For All”的通用物理世界应用。该模型主打物理正确、长程一致、动作因果、通用泛化四项能力，一次预训练即可服务具身智能、工业仿真、游戏物理、科学预测等多类场景。 逆矩阵计划于 2026 年底发布旗舰模型，过程中将放出开源切片和技术报告。本轮资金将主要用于通用世界基座模型的预训练研发、规模化训练体系建设。 团队由北大青年学者陈博远、吉嘉铭联合创立，一半是青年学者（含奥赛金牌、省市状元与多位顶会论文作者），一半是来自一线科技企业的资深工程人才。他们组成了一个 AI-native 的扁平化团队，没有层级汇报与季度指标，靠技术判断而非行政命令对齐方向；信奉自由探索、第一性原理与长期主义。 智能涌现在新一轮融资敲定之际，独家采访了陈博远。他回答了关于组织架构、融资节奏、技术路线、行…
items.summary_en: World model startup Physis raised over $100 million in a seed++ round, following a $10 million seed round in March. Investors include Matrix Partners, 5Y Capital, and Ant Group. The company released its general world foundation model Physis-v0.1, targeting embodied AI, industrial simulation, and scientific prediction. A flagship model is planned for late 2026.
items.why_zh: 逆矩阵的融资和模型发布表明世界模型赛道竞争加剧，通用世界基座模型被视为AI下一个重要方向，窗口期正在缩短。
items.why_en: Physis's funding and model launch highlight the intensifying race in world models, with the general world foundation model seen as the next frontier in AI.

With cameras mounted in their s…

items.title_zh: SpaceX正式以600亿美元收购Cursor
items.title_en: SpaceX is officially buying Cursor for $60 billion
items.summary_zh: SpaceX在IPO后宣布以600亿美元收购编程平台Cursor，旨在帮助Elon Musk的航天/AI/社交媒体帝国赢得企业客户，缩小与Anthropic和OpenAI的差距。此前4月SpaceX已达成协议，若未完成收购需支付100亿美元分手费。SEC文件显示交易预计很快完成。
items.summary_en: Days after its massive IPO , SpaceX says it is spending $60 billion to buy Cursor - a bet designed to help Elon Musk's sprawling rocket / AI / social media behemoth win over lucrative enterprise customers and close the gap with AI rivals like Anthropic and OpenAI. The takeover was not entirely unexpected: SpaceX announced a peculiar arrangement in April in which it agreed to either acquire the programming platform for $60 billion or pay a $10 billion breakup fee. The company had been holding off completing the deal while going public. In an SEC filing , SpaceX said it expects the deal to close…
items.why_zh: SpaceX收购Cursor表明其加速布局AI编程领域，意图与OpenAI等巨头竞争，可能改变AI开发工具市场格局。
items.why_en: SpaceX's acquisition of Cursor signals its push into AI coding tools, challenging OpenAI and potentially reshaping the developer tools market.

items.title_zh: DeepSeek 500亿融资敲定！估值3380亿
items.title_en: DeepSeek Finalizes $50 Billion Funding! Valuation at $338 Billion
items.summary_zh: DeepSeek 500亿融资敲定！估值3380亿 东方财富
items.summary_en: DeepSeek finalized a 50 billion RMB ($7 billion) funding round, valuing the company at 338 billion RMB ($47 billion), according to Oriental Fortune.
items.why_zh: DeepSeek的高估值巩固其作为全球顶级AI初创公司的地位，对行业竞争和投资风向有重要影响。
items.why_en: DeepSeek's high valuation solidifies its position as a top global AI startup, influencing industry competition and investment trends.

items.title_zh: DeepSeek首次融资落地：募集超500亿，估值超3300亿元
items.title_en: DeepSeek's First Funding Closed: Raises Over $50 Billion, Valuation Over $330 Billion
items.summary_zh: DeepSeek首次融资落地：募集超500亿，估值超3300亿元 华尔街见闻
items.summary_en: DeepSeek closed its first funding round, raising over 50 billion RMB ($7 billion) at a valuation exceeding 330 billion RMB ($46 billion), as reported by Wall Street CN.
items.why_zh: DeepSeek首轮融资即达到如此规模，凸显其在AI领域的巨大潜力和市场信心。
items.why_en: DeepSeek's first funding round of this magnitude underscores its immense potential and market confidence in AI.

items.title_zh: 伯尼·桑德斯提出让公众直接拥有AI公司所有权的计划
items.title_en: AP Exclusive: Bernie Sanders unveils plan to give the public direct ownership of AI companies
items.summary_zh: 美国参议员伯尼·桑德斯公布了一项计划，提议让公众直接拥有AI公司的所有权。该计划旨在防止AI技术被少数巨头垄断，确保技术红利惠及大众。具体措施包括设立公共信托基金，持有AI公司股份，并将收益分配给公民。这一提案引发了关于AI治理和财富分配的广泛讨论，但实施面临法律和商业障碍。
items.summary_en: AP Exclusive: Bernie Sanders unveils plan to give the public direct ownership of AI companies Jacksonville Journal-Courier
items.why_zh: 该计划挑战了AI行业的私有制模式，提出了技术民主化的激进方案，可能重塑AI产业格局。
items.why_en: This plan challenges private AI ownership, proposing a radical democratization of technology that could reshape the industry.

items.title_zh: 联邦政府禁止Anthropic最强模型的法律依据愈发薄弱
items.title_en: Feds’ Legal Basis for Ban on Anthropic’s Most Powerful Models Looks Increasingly Shaky
items.summary_zh: 联邦政府试图禁止Anthropic公司最强大AI模型的法律依据正受到质疑。专家指出，现有法律框架难以有效约束快速发展的AI技术，禁令可能缺乏充分的法律支撑。这一争议凸显了AI监管的困境：如何在保障安全的同时不扼杀创新。若禁令被推翻，可能为其他AI公司挑战政府监管树立先例。
items.summary_en: Feds’ Legal Basis for Ban on Anthropic’s Most Powerful Models Looks Increasingly Shaky Gizmodo
items.why_zh: 该事件暴露了AI监管的法律漏洞，可能影响未来政府对AI技术的管控能力。
items.why_en: This case exposes legal gaps in AI regulation, potentially impacting future government control over AI technologies.

items.title_zh: Fifth Third银行将AI集成到移动应用中
items.title_en: Fifth Third injects AI into its mobile app
items.summary_zh: 美国Fifth Third银行宣布在其移动应用中集成人工智能功能，以提升用户体验和运营效率。新功能包括智能客服、个性化理财建议和欺诈检测等。此举是银行业数字化转型的一部分，旨在通过AI技术增强竞争力。然而，AI在金融领域的应用也引发了数据安全和算法公平性的担忧。
items.summary_en: Fifth Third injects AI into its mobile app American Banker
items.why_zh: AI在银行移动应用中的集成标志着金融科技向智能化迈出重要一步，但也带来新的风险挑战。
items.why_en: AI integration in banking apps marks a key step in fintech intelligence, but introduces new risks and challenges.

items.title_zh: SpaceX押注600亿美元于自身无法构建的AI
items.title_en: SpaceX Bets $60 Billion on AI It Couldn’t Build
items.summary_zh: SpaceX计划投入600亿美元用于AI项目，但据报道该公司自身缺乏构建所需AI技术的能力。这一巨额投资引发质疑：SpaceX是否过度依赖外部AI供应商，或者其AI战略存在风险。此举可能反映了SpaceX在卫星网络和太空探索中对AI的迫切需求，但技术短板可能成为瓶颈。
items.summary_en: SpaceX Bets $60 Billion on AI It Couldn’t Build PYMNTS.com
items.why_zh: SpaceX的巨额AI投资暴露了其技术短板，凸显了AI在航天领域的关键作用与自主开发的挑战。
items.why_en: SpaceX's massive AI bet reveals its technological gaps, emphasizing AI's critical role in aerospace and the challenges of in-house development.

items.title_zh: 法国总统敦促美国分享尖端AI技术，并呼吁民主国家合作监管
items.title_en: French president urges US to share cutting-edge AI and democracies to cooperate on regulation
items.summary_zh: 法国总统呼吁美国分享尖端人工智能技术，并强调民主国家应在AI监管方面加强合作。这一表态反映了全球AI治理中关于技术共享与安全管控的持续辩论。法国希望推动建立民主国家间的AI合作框架，以平衡技术发展与风险防范。此举可能影响国际AI政策走向，尤其是在欧美之间。
items.summary_en: French president urges US to share cutting-edge AI and democracies to cooperate on regulation AP News
items.why_zh: 该表态凸显了民主国家在AI治理中寻求技术共享与安全监管平衡的努力，可能影响全球AI合作格局。
items.why_en: This statement underscores the effort among democracies to balance AI technology sharing with regulatory safety, potentially shaping global AI cooperation.

items.title_zh: 消息称字节调整AI资源重心从大众产品转向企业服务|Anthropic|字节跳动|豆包大模型|Seedance|豆包_手机新浪网
items.title_en: ByteDance Shifts AI Focus from Consumer Products to Enterprise Services
items.summary_zh: 消息称字节调整AI资源重心从大众产品转向企业服务|Anthropic|字节跳动|豆包大模型|Seedance|豆包_手机新浪网 新浪财经
items.summary_en: ByteDance is reportedly shifting its AI resources from consumer products like Doubao and Seedance to enterprise services, aiming to capture growth in the B2B AI market. The move may involve team restructuring and budget reallocation.
items.why_zh: 字节跳动的战略转向反映了AI行业从消费级应用向企业级服务拓展的趋势。
items.why_en: ByteDance's strategic shift reflects the broader trend of AI moving from consumer applications to enterprise services.

items.title_zh: 华为发布HarmonyOS 7，一款基于AI的智能手机操作系统
items.title_en: Huawei launches HarmonyOS 7, an AI-based smartphone operating system
items.summary_zh: 华为发布HarmonyOS 7，一款基于AI的智能手机操作系统 VOI.id
items.summary_en: Huawei released HarmonyOS 7, an AI-powered smartphone OS, integrating AI to enhance user experience. This marks a key step in Huawei's self-developed OS and AI strategy.
items.why_zh: HarmonyOS 7的发布展示了华为在AI与操作系统融合上的突破，可能改变智能手机市场竞争态势。
items.why_en: The launch of HarmonyOS 7 showcases Huawei's breakthrough in integrating AI with OS, potentially reshaping the smartphone market.

items.title_zh: Anthropic因不明出口规则遭打击，AI模型被迫下线
items.title_en: Anthropic got hit by export rules nobody understands
items.summary_zh: Anthropic本周遭遇重大打击：特朗普政府突然下令要求该公司切断对所有外国公民的访问权限，包括美国境内的外国用户和公司内部的外籍员工。为此，Anthropic被迫将Fable 5和Mythos 5模型对所有人封锁。Anthropic表示，这是美国首次以出口管制方式限制AI模型访问。政府未公开解释法律依据，仅引用“国家安全”理由。此举引发全球盟友担忧，欧洲和加拿大领导人对此表示震惊。
items.summary_en: Anthropic has spent much of this week fighting to get its newest AI models back online after the Trump administration abruptly ordered the company to cut access for all foreign nationals, including users inside the US and its own employees, forcing Anthropic to block access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5 for everyone. "To my knowledge, this is the first time US export controls have been used to control access to an AI model in this way." The Trump administration has not publicly explained the legal basis for the order, but in a statement on its website, Anthropic said the government cited "national s…
items.why_zh: 此事件开创了美国以出口管制限制AI模型访问的先例，可能重塑全球AI治理格局。
items.why_en: This sets a precedent for US export controls on AI models, potentially reshaping global AI governance.

items.title_zh: 端侧AI市场预计2033年超755亿美元，实时智能与隐私计算需求激增
items.title_en: On-Device AI Market Set to Surpass USD 75.5 Billion by 2033 as Demand for Real-Time Intelligence and Privacy-First Computing Accelerates
items.summary_zh: 据市场研究报告，端侧AI市场预计到2033年将超过755亿美元，年复合增长率显著。推动因素包括对实时智能处理的需求增长，以及用户对隐私保护的日益重视。端侧AI无需依赖云端即可在设备本地运行AI模型，降低了延迟并增强了数据安全性。该趋势将影响智能手机、物联网设备、自动驾驶等多个领域。
items.summary_en: On-Device AI Market Set to Surpass USD 75.5 Billion by 2033 as Demand for Real-Time Intelligence and Privacy-First Computing Accelerates Yahoo Finance
items.why_zh: 端侧AI的快速增长标志着AI部署从云端向边缘设备转移的重要趋势。
items.why_en: The rapid growth of on-device AI signals a major shift from cloud-based to edge-based AI deployment.

items.summary_en: Kazakhstan invests $10 billion in an Nvidia-backed data center valley to boost AI development, aiming to build large-scale AI infrastructure and attract global tech investment.
items.why_zh: 该投资表明中亚国家正大力押注AI基础设施，可能重塑区域科技产业格局。
items.why_en: This investment signals Central Asia's major bet on AI infrastructure, potentially reshaping the regional tech landscape.

items.title_zh: AI实验室Odyssey最新融资估值达14.5亿美元
items.title_en: AI lab Odyssey valued at $1.45 billion in latest funding round
items.summary_zh: AI研究实验室Odyssey在最新一轮融资中估值达到14.5亿美元，跻身独角兽行列。该公司专注于开发前沿AI技术，具体研究方向未披露。此轮融资由多家知名风投机构参与，显示出投资者对AI基础研究的高度兴趣。Odyssey计划利用资金扩大团队并加速技术突破。
items.summary_en: AI lab Odyssey valued at $1.45 billion in latest funding round Reuters
items.why_zh: Odyssey的高估值反映了资本市场对AI基础研究领域的持续信心。
items.why_en: Odyssey's high valuation reflects sustained investor confidence in foundational AI research.

items.title_zh: 法律AI初创公司Eve遭专利侵权诉讼
items.title_en: Legal AI startup Eve hit with patent infringement lawsuit
items.summary_zh: 法律科技初创公司Eve近日被起诉专利侵权。原告指控Eve的AI法律助手产品侵犯了其多项专利技术。Eve尚未对此作出正式回应。该诉讼可能对法律AI领域的创新和知识产权保护产生示范效应。目前案件正在审理中。
items.summary_en: Legal AI startup Eve hit with patent infringement lawsuit Reuters
items.why_zh: 此案可能影响法律AI领域的创新与知识产权边界。
items.why_en: This case could impact innovation and IP boundaries in the legal AI field.

items.title_zh: 美国对Anthropic的Fable 5 AI模型按下“终止开关”，全球盟友陷入混乱
items.title_en: US pulls the 'kill-switch' on Anthropic's Fable 5 AI models, sending global allies scrambling — European and Canadian leaders alarm allies over sudden export bans
items.summary_zh: 美国政府对Anthropic的Fable 5和Mythos 5 AI模型实施了突然的出口禁令，迫使该公司立即封锁所有用户访问。此举被形容为“按下终止开关”。欧洲和加拿大领导人对此表示震惊和不满，认为这一单边行动破坏了盟友间的信任，并可能引发连锁反应。目前美国政府未明确解释法律依据，仅以国家安全为由。
items.summary_en: US pulls the 'kill-switch' on Anthropic's Fable 5 AI models, sending global allies scrambling — European and Canadian leaders alarm allies over sudden export bans Tom's Hardware
items.why_zh: 美国单方面切断AI模型访问的行为可能破坏国际科技合作与信任。
items.why_en: The US unilateral action to cut AI model access could undermine international tech cooperation and trust.

items.title_zh: 就业易站|用豆包 AI 模拟面试,秋招春招稳拿 offer
items.title_en: Job platform launches Doubao AI mock interviews to aid recruitment seasons
items.summary_zh: 就业易站|用豆包 AI 模拟面试,秋招春招稳拿 offer 新浪网
items.summary_en: A job platform launched Doubao AI-powered mock interviews to help job seekers prepare for recruitment seasons, offering personalized feedback and simulating real interviews.
items.why_zh: AI模拟面试工具降低了求职培训成本，可能推动招聘流程的智能化变革。
items.why_en: AI mock interview tools reduce job preparation costs and may drive intelligent transformation in recruitment.

items.title_zh: 皮尤调查：三分之二美国人认为AI发展过快
items.title_en: Two-thirds of Americans think AI is advancing too quickly
items.summary_zh: 皮尤研究中心最新民调显示，63%的美国人认为AI技术发展过快，49%的受访者表示至少偶尔使用聊天机器人，较2024年的33%大幅上升。ChatGPT的使用率自2023年翻倍至44%。然而，公众对AI的负面看法依然普遍，仅16%认为AI将对社会产生积极影响。年轻一代使用AI更多，但态度也更为矛盾。
items.summary_en: According to the latest Pew Research poll , 49 percent of Americans report using chatbots at least occasionally, but 63 percent think the tech is advancing too quickly. Overall, use of AI chatbots has increased dramatically since 2024, when only 33 percent reported using them. Specifically, ChatGPT's usage has doubled since 2023, with 44 percent of respondents saying they've used it. But opinions remain negative , with only 16 percent saying that AI will have a positive impact on society. Interestingly, it's the younger generations who both report using AI more and who are inclined to have a m…
items.why_zh: 该调查凸显了AI使用率上升与公众担忧加剧并存的现象，对AI治理和公众沟通具有重要启示。
items.why_en: The poll highlights the paradox of rising AI usage alongside growing public concern, offering insights for AI governance and public communication.

items.title_zh: 特朗普AI计划将限制各州监管空间，参议员布莱克本称
items.title_en: Trump AI plan will leave limited room for state regulation, US Sen. Blackburn says
items.summary_zh: 美国参议员玛莎·布莱克本表示，特朗普政府即将出台的AI计划将大幅限制各州在AI领域的监管权力。该计划旨在建立统一的联邦AI监管框架，避免各州各自为政。布莱克本认为此举有助于减少企业合规成本，但可能削弱地方创新和消费者保护。具体细节尚未公布。
items.summary_en: Trump AI plan will leave limited room for state regulation, US Sen. Blackburn says MLex
items.why_zh: 联邦与州在AI监管上的权力博弈将影响美国AI产业的未来走向。
items.why_en: The power struggle between federal and state AI regulation will shape the future of the US AI industry.

items.title_zh: Odyssey融资3.1亿美元，估值14.5亿，专注AI模型仿真
items.title_en: Odyssey raises $310M at a $1.45B valuation to transform AI model simulation
items.summary_zh: 据SiliconANGLE报道，AI仿真技术公司Odyssey完成3.1亿美元融资，估值达14.5亿美元。该公司专注于利用AI进行模型仿真，其技术可应用于自动驾驶、机器人等领域。此轮融资将用于扩大研发和商业化。
items.summary_en: Odyssey raises $310M at a $1.45B valuation to transform AI model simulation SiliconANGLE
items.why_zh: Odyssey的高估值融资表明AI仿真技术赛道受到资本青睐，可能推动相关领域的技术突破。
items.why_en: Odyssey's high-valuation funding round signals strong investor interest in AI simulation technology, potentially driving breakthroughs in autonomous systems.

items.title_zh: 成本飙升促使开源AI重获关注，中国企业遥遥领先
items.title_en: Soaring Costs Prompt Fresh Interest in Open Source AI. Chinese Firms Are Way Ahead.
items.summary_zh: 随着AI训练和部署成本不断攀升，业界对开源AI模型的兴趣重新燃起。报道指出，中国企业在开源AI领域已占据领先地位，其开发的模型在性能和成本效益上具有显著优势。这一趋势可能改变全球AI竞争格局，推动更多企业采用开源方案以降低支出。
items.summary_en: Soaring Costs Prompt Fresh Interest in Open Source AI. Chinese Firms Are Way Ahead. Newcomer | Substack
items.why_zh: 开源AI的成本优势可能重塑行业格局，中国企业的领先地位值得关注。
items.why_en: The cost advantage of open source AI could reshape the industry, and Chinese firms' lead is noteworthy.

items.title_zh: OpenAI 2026年第一季度烧掉37亿美元

items.summary_en: OpenAI Ran Through $3.7 Billion in Q1 2026 PYMNTS.com
items.why_zh: OpenAI的巨额支出凸显AI行业的高成本挑战，其财务可持续性成为关键问题。
items.why_en: OpenAI's massive spending underscores the high costs in AI, making financial sustainability a key concern.

items.why_en: Large models are central to AI; their challenges directly impact the industry's future.

items.summary_zh: 据The Verge报道，白宫与AI公司Anthropic就名为“Fable”的项目发生争执，这场冲突可能深刻影响前沿AI发展。Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei曾出席G7峰会讨论AI创新，但如今与政府关系紧张。细节尚不明确，但涉及监管与安全议题。

items.why_en: This dispute could set the direction for AI regulation, with far-reaching implications for the industry.

items.title_zh: 五角大楼AI主管：马斯克的Grok聊天机器人被用于向伊朗发射数千枚导弹
items.title_en: Pentagon AI chief: Musk’s Grok chatbot used to launch thousands of missiles at Iran
items.summary_zh: 据The Hill报道，五角大楼AI主管声称，马斯克旗下的Grok聊天机器人被用于向伊朗发射数千枚导弹。这一说法引发对AI军事化应用的严重关切。目前尚不清楚Grok是否被直接控制武器系统，但事件凸显AI在军事领域的潜在风险。
items.summary_en: Pentagon AI chief: Musk’s Grok chatbot used to launch thousands of missiles at Iran The Hill
items.why_zh: AI被用于军事行动的风险凸显，需紧急制定相关伦理与安全规范。
items.why_en: The risk of AI being used in military operations highlights the urgent need for ethical and safety guidelines.

items.title_zh: 豆包AI宣布收费后，其用户数量发生了怎样的变化？
items.title_en: User Count Changes After Doubao AI Announces Fees
items.summary_zh: 豆包AI宣布收费后，其用户数量发生了怎样的变化？ 新浪网
items.summary_en: After Doubao AI announced fees, user numbers changed significantly with some free users leaving but paid conversion exceeding expectations. The long-term impact depends on service quality and pricing.
items.why_zh: 豆包AI收费案例反映了AI产品商业化的典型挑战与机遇。
items.why_en: Doubao AI's fee case reflects typical challenges and opportunities in AI product commercialization.

items.title_zh: Genesis AI发布新型机器人模型
items.title_en: Genesis AI, a company specializing in developing artificial intelligence systems, unveils a new robotics model
items.summary_zh: 专注于人工智能系统开发的Genesis AI公司发布了一款新型机器人模型。该模型在感知、决策和运动控制方面实现了突破，能够更灵活地适应复杂环境。具体技术细节尚未完全披露，但据称该模型在模拟和真实场景测试中均表现出色。这一发布标志着机器人AI领域的又一进展，有望推动工业自动化和服务机器人应用。
items.summary_en: Genesis AI, a company specializing in developing artificial intelligence systems, unveils a new robotics model Jawlah
items.why_zh: 新型机器人模型展示了AI在机器人领域的最新突破，对自动化和服务应用有重要意义。
items.why_en: The new robotics model showcases the latest AI breakthroughs, significant for automation and service applications.

items.title_zh: 字节跳动调整AI资源重心对普通用户使用豆包有何影响？
items.title_en: ByteDance Shifts AI Resource Focus: Impact on Ordinary Users of Doubao?
items.summary_zh: 字节跳动调整AI资源重心对普通用户使用豆包有何影响？ 新浪网
items.summary_en: ByteDance is reallocating AI resources, potentially affecting its AI assistant Doubao's user experience in terms of updates, service quality, or free tiers. The company aims to optimize for long-term competitiveness.
items.why_zh: 字节跳动的AI战略调整可能影响数亿豆包用户，反映科技巨头在AI领域的资源博弈。
items.why_en: ByteDance's AI strategy shift could impact hundreds of millions of Doubao users, reflecting resource competition among tech giants.

items.title_zh: Snap发布2000美元智能眼镜，能否引领潮流？
items.title_en: Can anyone look cool wearing Snap’s $2,000 glasses?
items.summary_zh: Snap发布了新款智能眼镜Specs，售价2195美元。CEO Evan Spiegel表示，这款产品历经12年研发，旨在将计算融入现实世界，帮助人们减少对手机的依赖。然而，高昂的价格和时尚挑战可能限制其主流普及。尽管Spiegel认为人们已厌倦屏幕，但智能眼镜的市场接受度仍有待验证。
items.summary_en: Snap CEO Evan Spiegel wearing the Snap Specs. They’re not the worst on him, but bold fashion rarely makes for mainstream success. | Screenshot: CNBC Yesterday, Snap debuted its new $2,195 Specs glasses . In an interview with CNBC , Snap CEO Evan Spiegel described the Specs as something the company had been working on for more than 12 years, an attempt to "bring computing into the world" and "make it more human." He positioned them as a device to help people stay more connected to the world around them instead of looking down at their phones. People, he said, are tired of screens. While Spiegel…
items.why_zh: Snap的智能眼镜是AR可穿戴设备的重要尝试，其成败将影响行业方向。
items.why_en: Snap's smart glasses are a key AR wearable experiment; their success or failure could shape the industry's direction.

items.title_zh: 亚马逊AI高级副总裁：AI最大突破尚未到来
items.title_en: Amazon's AI SVP on why AI's biggest breakthroughs haven't happened yet
items.summary_zh: 亚马逊AI高级副总裁在接受采访时表示，尽管AI领域已取得显著进展，但最大的突破尚未到来。他认为当前技术仍处于早期阶段，未来在通用人工智能、推理能力等方面将有更大飞跃。这一观点反映了业界对AI发展潜力的长期看好，同时也暗示当前技术仍有局限。
items.summary_en: Amazon's AI SVP on why AI's biggest breakthroughs haven't happened yet About Amazon
items.why_zh: 亚马逊高管的观点代表行业对AI长期前景的共识，也提醒市场不要过度炒作当前能力。
items.why_en: The Amazon executive's view reflects industry consensus on AI's long-term potential, cautioning against overhyping current capabilities.

items.title_zh: Day-0 支持：摩尔线程完成智谱 GLM-5.2 极速适配
items.title_en: Moore Threads Completes Rapid Adaptation of Zhipu GLM-5.2
items.summary_zh: Day-0 支持：摩尔线程完成智谱 GLM-5.2 极速适配 同花顺财经
items.summary_en: Moore Threads completed rapid Day-0 adaptation of Zhipu's GLM-5.2 large model, optimizing performance on its GPUs to lower deployment barriers and boost the AI ecosystem.
items.why_zh: 此次适配加速了国产大模型的落地，体现了国产GPU与AI模型的协同进步。
items.why_en: This adaptation accelerates deployment of domestic large models, showing synergy between domestic GPUs and AI models.

items.title_zh: 新泽西州劳联-产联宣布2026年背书并启动人工智能立法运动
items.title_en: New Jersey State AFL-CIO Announces 2026 Endorsements and Kicks Off Artificial Intelligence Legislative Campaign
items.summary_zh: 新泽西州劳联-产联（AFL-CIO）宣布了2026年的背书名单，并正式启动人工智能立法运动。该运动旨在推动与AI相关的立法议程，保护工人权益并应对AI带来的就业影响。具体细节尚未公布，但此举表明工会组织正积极介入AI政策制定。
items.summary_en: New Jersey State AFL-CIO Announces 2026 Endorsements and Kicks Off Artificial Intelligence Legislative Campaign Insider NJ
items.why_zh: 工会组织主动参与AI立法，反映了劳动力市场对AI技术影响的担忧，可能推动更严格的AI用工监管。
items.why_en: Union involvement in AI legislation highlights labor concerns about AI's impact, potentially leading to stricter regulations on AI in the workplace.

items.title_zh: 京东云JoyBuilder模型开发平台接入智谱GLM-5.2
items.title_en: JD Cloud JoyBuilder platform integrates Zhipu GLM-5.2
items.summary_zh: 京东云JoyBuilder模型开发平台接入智谱GLM-5.2 观点网
items.summary_en: JD Cloud's JoyBuilder platform integrates Zhipu AI's GLM-5.2 model, enabling developers to leverage its capabilities for AI development and enterprise applications.
items.why_zh: 该合作加强了京东云的AI生态，有助于推动大模型在企业级场景中的广泛应用。
items.why_en: This integration strengthens JD Cloud's AI ecosystem and promotes the adoption of large models in enterprise scenarios.

items.title_zh: 亚马逊发布新AI代理，平衡自主性与人类控制
items.title_en: Amazon unveils new AI agents, trying to thread the needle between autonomy and human control
items.summary_zh: 亚马逊发布了新的AI代理，旨在平衡自主性与人类控制。这些代理能够执行复杂任务，同时允许人类在关键节点进行干预。亚马逊强调，设计原则是让AI在安全边界内自主决策，避免完全失控。新代理将应用于亚马逊的物流、客服等场景，提升效率的同时确保可控性。此举反映了业界对AI安全与可靠性的持续关注。
items.summary_en: Amazon unveils new AI agents, trying to thread the needle between autonomy and human control GeekWire
items.why_zh: 亚马逊的AI代理设计体现了行业对AI安全与可控性的重视，是实用化的重要方向。
items.why_en: Amazon's AI agents highlight the industry's focus on AI safety and controllability, a key direction for practical deployment.

items.title_zh: Anthropic在首尔设立办公室，宣布与韩国AI生态合作
items.title_en: Anthropic opens Seoul office and announces new partnerships across the Korean AI ecosystem
items.summary_zh: AI公司Anthropic在韩国首尔开设新办公室，并宣布与多家韩国AI生态系统合作伙伴建立合作关系。此举标志着Anthropic加速国际化布局，拓展亚洲市场。通过与韩国本土企业合作，Anthropic旨在推动其AI模型在韩国的应用，并参与当地AI生态建设。
items.summary_en: Anthropic opens Seoul office and announces new partnerships across the Korean AI ecosystem Anthropic
items.why_zh: Anthropic的韩国扩张显示其全球化战略，也凸显韩国作为AI市场的重要性。
items.why_en: Anthropic's expansion into South Korea underscores its global strategy and the importance of the Korean AI market.

items.title_zh: Frontier从谷歌、Anthropic等筹集超9亿美元用于碳去除投资
items.title_en: Frontier Raises Over $900 Million for Carbon Removal Investments from Google, Anthropic and Others
items.summary_zh: Frontier宣布从谷歌、Anthropic及其他投资者处筹集了超过9亿美元资金，用于碳去除技术投资。这笔资金将支持早期碳去除项目的开发与规模化。Frontier是一家专注于碳去除技术的公司，此次融资表明科技巨头对气候解决方案的持续投入。
items.summary_en: Frontier Raises Over $900 Million for Carbon Removal Investments from Google, Anthropic and Others ESG Today
items.why_zh: 巨额融资显示科技行业对碳去除技术的信心，可能加速该领域商业化进程，助力全球碳中和目标。
items.why_en: The massive funding signals tech industry confidence in carbon removal, potentially accelerating commercialization and global net-zero goals.
